Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Void Dragon’s Dance]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Void Dragon’s Dance is a technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Void Dragon’s Dance produces five roses of fire that are golden-orange with inky black and bloody red spots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — Void Dragon’s Dance is a technique used by Blackflames during the Trials.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — Void Dragon's Dance is a technique that Orthos mentions.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Orthos instructs Lindon to practice the Void Dragon's Dance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Void Dragon's Dance is empowered by destruction aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — The Void Dragon's Dance can reduce creatures to ash.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — The Void Dragon's Dance is a furious cyclone of fire and destruction.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Void Dragon's Dance is a technique used by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Naian uses a localized Void Dragon's Dance during his attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon's Void Dragon's Dance uses winds of fire and destruction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — A miniature Void Dragon's Dance swirls around Lindon's Forged Blackflame claws.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — The Void Dragon’s Dance is a technique that descends on the pyramid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon performs a Void Dragon’s Dance.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
